@if (isGridItem()) {
@if (showPercentage() || showQuantity()) {
@if (showPercentage()) { {{ percentage() }}% } @if (showQuantity()) { ({{ completed() }}/{{ total() }}) }
}
} @else {
@if (label() || showPercentage() || showQuantity()) {
@if (label()) { {{ label() }} }
@if (showPercentage()) { {{ percentage() }}% } @if (showQuantity()) { {{ completed() }}/{{ total() }} }
}
}
